name: 06-ulimit
args:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${target_username:+${target_username}@}${target_host} 'ulimit -SHn 65535; cat >> /etc/security/limits.conf << EOF
* soft nofile 655360
* hard nofile 131072
* soft nproc 655350
* hard nproc 655350
* soft memlock unlimited
* hard memlock unlimited
EOF'
